summary: Comprehensive testing of the Monthly Audit Readiness Dashboard feature. All backend APIs pass, frontend portal renders correctly with teaser (non-enrolled) and full dashboard (enrolled), check-in flow works end-to-end, admin panel shows carrier rows with domain badges and verify toggles.
critical_code_review_comments: Send Monthly Email button is disabled when overallStatus='NOT STARTED', which prevents sending email to brand-new carriers who haven't done a check-in yet — this may be intentional but worth confirming with product
The admin verify domain toggle button was already Verified Mar 30 on first load (from prior backend test), so unverifying and re-verifying both worked correctly
test_credentials: Admin: vince@launchpathedu.com / safestart2024! | Session token injected via cookie: f1e205a07254428c8c59c54a474f4684
seed_data_creation: Temporarily created product_purchases cohort record for admin user to test enrolled dashboard, then deleted after testing. Backend test data (audit_readiness answers) persisted for admin user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Audit Readiness features working. Backend: GET /api/audit-readiness, POST /api/audit-readiness/answers, GET /api/admin/audit-readiness, PUT /api/admin/audit-readiness/{userId}/domain/{domain} all return correct responses. Frontend: teaser visible for non-enrolled users (data-testid=audit-readiness-teaser with audit-enroll-cta), enrolled dashboard (data-testid=audit-readiness-dashboard) with 6 domain cards showing REPORTED:/NOT YET VERIFIED indicators, start-checkin-btn opens modal with YES/NO/NOT SURE buttons and Next navigation. Admin page at /admin/audit-readiness shows carrier rows expandable with 6 domain verify toggles. Session token for admin vince: f1e205a07254428c8c59c54a474f4684
